# Galley Editor LLM Documentation

Galley Editor is a React Markdown editor built on CodeMirror 6. Use these plain Markdown files for machine-readable documentation. Public GitLab Pages paths include the `/inky/galley-editor/` base.

- Complete guide: https://pages.inkyquill.net/inky/galley-editor/llms/complete-guide.md
- Human documentation site: https://pages.inkyquill.net/inky/galley-editor/
- API reference: https://pages.inkyquill.net/inky/galley-editor/reference/api/
- Plugins and renderers: https://pages.inkyquill.net/inky/galley-editor/guides/plugins-renderers/
- Customization: https://pages.inkyquill.net/inky/galley-editor/guides/customization/

The complete guide covers custom commands, renderers, toolbar buttons, toolbar icons, accessible naming, styling, themes, built-in commands, supporting actions, app-owned document workflow, and app-owned file upload tracking.
